2605.17839.title: Balancing Knowledge Distillation for Imbalance Learning with Bilevel Optimization
2605.17839.paper_summary: Knowledge distillation transfers knowledge from a high capacity teacher to a compact student using a mixture of hard and soft losses. On imbalanced data, a fixed weighting between hard and soft losses becomes brittle the learning process. Recent studies try to reweight these components in long-tailed settings. However, most of these meth- ods do not adapt weights at the sample-wise level and do not take into account the students behavior during training. To address this, we pro- pose BiKD - a bilevel framework that dynamically balances hard and soft losses for each sample. We employ a weight generation network that produces adaptive per-sample weights, guided by a small balanced vali- dation set. The student is now trained with an unconstrained combina- tion of weighted hard and soft losses, allowing the student to relax both terms. We further propose a multi-step SGD strategy to optimize the weight model more accurately and efficiently. Experiments on long-tailed CIFAR-10/100 show that our approach surpasses recent balanced distil- lation methods across imbalance factors.
2605.17839.paper_summary_zh: 知識蒸餾將知識從高容量的教師轉移到緊湊的學生，使用硬損失和軟損失的混合。在不平衡數據上，硬損失和軟損失之間的固定權重使學習過程變得脆弱。最近的研究試圖在長尾設置中重新加權這些組件。然而，這些方法大多不在樣本級別調整權重，也未考慮學生在訓練過程中的行為。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了BiKD - 一個雙層框架，動態平衡每個樣本的硬損失和軟損失。我們使用一個權重生成網絡，根據一個小的平衡驗證集生成自適應的每樣本權重。現在，學生在不受限制的加權硬損失和軟損失的組合下進行訓練，允許學生放鬆這兩個項目。我們進一步提出了一種多步驟的SGD策略，以更準確和高效地優化權重模型。在長尾CIFAR-10/100上的實驗顯示，我們的方法超越了最近的平衡蒸餾方法，無論在不平衡因素上。
2605.17839.author: Anh B. H. Nguyen et.al.
2605.17839.authors: Anh B. H. Nguyen, Ba Tho Phan, Viet Cuong Ta
